answer: On September 15, 2026, Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title were overstated because settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 joined party identity data on normalized_tax_id, which is not unique at closing-role grain and duplicated buyer/seller escrow disbursements in finance.disbursement_recon_daily. The fix is to use closing_party_role_id and backfill the affected Florida purchase closings.

facts.affected_segment: florida purchase closings for fnf national title
facts.remediation: switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins, and backfill florida purchase closings
